subcodes.title: Words to Mr Lee and Miss Hodgson, spoken on 1913-05-09
subcodes.first_line: Every soul must first teach himself; he must be severed, attracted, enkindled; he must be living the life -- then his words will have effect... This Cause has cost us very dear. We have not received it cheaply.
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان اول باید خود را تبلیغ نماید خود منجذب و منقطع باشد تا نفس او در دیگران تأثیر کند
subcodes.subjects: @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @development of capacity and readiness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @methods of teaching the Cause
